chapter_title: Spec. Provisions & Exceptions for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles

subsections.text: The length limitations provided by Sections 621.203 (Maximum Length of Motor Vehicle) to 621.205 do not apply to:
machinery used exclusively for drilling water wells, including machinery that is itself a unit or that is a unit mounted on a conventional vehicle or chassis;
a vehicle owned or operated by a public, private, or volunteer fire department;

a vehicle or combination of vehicles operated exclusively in the territory of a municipality or to a combination of vehicles operated by a municipality in a suburb adjoining the municipality in which the municipality has been using the equipment or similar equipment in connection with an established service to the suburb;

a truck-tractor, truck-tractor combination, or truck-trailer combination exclusively transporting machinery, materials, and equipment used in the construction, operation, and maintenance of facilities, including pipelines, that are used for the discovery, production, and processing of natural gas or petroleum;
a drive-away saddlemount vehicle transporter combination or a drive-away saddlemount with fullmount vehicle transporter combination, as defined by 23 C.F.R. Part 658 or its successor, if:

subsections.label: A
subsections.text: the overall length of the combination is not longer than 97 feet; and

subsections.label: B
subsections.text: the combination does not have more than three saddlemounted vehicles if the combination does not include more than one fullmount vehicle;
the combination of a tow truck and another vehicle or vehicle combination if:

subsections.label: A
subsections.text: the other vehicle or vehicle combination cannot be normally or safely driven or was abandoned on a highway; and

subsections.label: B
subsections.text: the tow truck is towing the other vehicle or vehicle combination directly to the nearest authorized place of repair, terminal, or destination of unloading;

a vehicle or combination of vehicles used to transport a harvest machine that is used in farm custom harvesting operations on a farm if the overall length of the vehicle or combination is not longer than:

subsections.label: A
subsections.text: 75 feet if the vehicle is traveling on a highway that is part of the national system of interstate and defense highways or the federal aid primary highway system; or

subsections.label: B
subsections.text: 81-1/2 feet if the vehicle is not traveling on a highway that is part of the national system of interstate and defense highways or the federal aid primary highway system;
a truck-tractor operated in combination with a semitrailer and trailer or semitrailer and semitrailer if:

subsections.label: A
subsections.text: the combination is used to transport a harvest machine that is used in farm custom harvesting operations on a farm;

subsections.label: B
subsections.text: the overall length of the combination, excluding the length of the truck-tractor, is not longer than 81-1/2 feet; and

subsections.label: C
subsections.text: the combination is traveling on a highway that:

subsections.label: i
subsections.text: is not part of the national system of interstate and defense highways or the federal aid primary highway system; and

subsections.label: ii
subsections.text: is located in a county with a population of less than 300,000; or
a towaway trailer transporter combination, as defined by 49 U.S.C. Section 31111, if the overall length of the combination is not longer than 82 feet.

history.raw: Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 411 (S.B.1815), Sec. 2, eff. September 1, 2021.
